name: drift
description: Reverse lookup a line of code to its originating AI prompt, and trace a session's produced events. Read-only queries over the local Drift AI store.

drift.description: Drift AI stdio MCP server. Tools: drift_blame, drift_trace, drift_rejected, drift_log, drift_show_event.

commands.name: drift:blame
commands.description: Show the AI+human timeline for a file (optionally for a single line or range).
commands.prompt: Use the drift_blame MCP tool to show the full timeline of CodeEvents for {{file}}{{#if line}} at line {{line}}{{/if}}. Summarise the multi-agent history in 5 bullet points or fewer.

commands.name: drift:trace
commands.description: Show every CodeEvent a given session produced.
commands.prompt: Call the drift_trace MCP tool with session_id={{session_id}} and summarise: files touched, key decisions, accepted vs rejected events.
